properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Awesome, magnificent all sufficient God Eternal redeemer, through His precious blood Our fortress forever, on His name we call Awesome, magnificent all sufficient God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is here among us, in all His majesty We have come to honor, our gracious King of kings He has been so faithful, and He will remain Join us as we worship, crown Him with praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Shake hands with your neighbor And say "it's good to be In the presence of the blessed, holy Trinity" Let us lift our voices to Christ who reigns above Generously granting mercy, grace and love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Our fortress forever, on His name we call Awesome, magnificent, Awesome, magnificent Awesome, magnificent all sufficient God
